scripts.discover:sitemaps: node scripts/sitemap-seed-expander.mjs --common-crawl-config common-crawl.config.json --crawler-config crawler.config.json --discovery-file crawler-output/discovered-sources.json --out crawler-output/discovered-sources.json --write-config
scripts.crawl:discovered: node scripts/build-discovered-crawler-config.mjs --discovery-file crawler-output/discovered-sources.json --base-config crawler.config.json --out crawler-output/discovered-crawler.config.json && node scripts/crawler.mjs --config crawler-output/discovered-crawler.config.json --out .tmp/discovered-live-crawl.json && node scripts/merge-crawl-output.mjs --base crawler-output/latest-crawl.json --incoming .tmp/discovered-live-crawl.json --out crawler-output/latest-crawl.json
